MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Mar-3-2026 at 10:30AM in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2025 Continued To Dec-23-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Allowing Service Of Process To Secretary Of State
Off Calendar Aug-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BUILD GROUP, INC.'s Motion For Order Allowing Service Of Process To Secretary Of State.

The unopposed motion for an order allowing service of process upon Midfield PMC LLC by means of personal delivery to the Secretary of State or her assistant or deputy pursuant to Corporations Code, section 17707.07, subdivision (b), is granted. Plaintiff Build Group Inc. shows that it has exercised reasonable diligence in attempting service on this dissolved entity's agent for service of process and has been unable to accomplish service.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
